domainDetection.reasoning: The documents center around customer health, product adoption (35% adoption, onboarding issues), key performance indicators (NPS, CSAT), renewal status (concerns, may not renew), and potential expansion opportunities (Analytics Module, AI Assistant). They also highlight the need for executive engagement (executive sponsor, executive review meeting, escalate to senior leadership) to manage the customer relationship and ensure retention.

executionPlanReasoning: Fallback planner selected agents using deterministic rules.

evidence: Customer frustration detected in uploaded documents.
Customer stated they may not renew.

snippets.heading: RECOMMENDED ACTIONS
snippets.text: 1. Schedule an Executive Business Review. 2. Review customer business objectives. 3. Conduct a Product Adoption Workshop. 4. Identify executive sponsor. 5. Discuss renewal timeline. 6. Review open support issues. 7. Create customer success action plan. 8....

snippets.heading: WHEN TO USE
snippets.text: - Renewal date is within 30 days. - Customer health score is below 70. - Customer has raised multiple concerns. - Product adoption is low. - Executive stakeholders are not engaged.

snippets.heading: RECOMMENDED ACTIONS
snippets.text: 1. Executive Business Review. 2. Product Adoption Workshop. 3. Customer Success Plan. 4. Weekly Follow-up. 5. Renewal Discussion. 6. Escalate high-value accounts.

snippets.heading: EARLY WARNING SIGNALS
snippets.text: - Usage declined more than 40%. - Renewal within 30 days. - Low NPS. - Multiple complaints. - Executive disengagement. - Competitor mentioned.

snippets.heading: RECOMMENDED ACTIONS
snippets.text: 1. Escalate to Support Manager. 2. Notify Engineering Team. 3. Provide workaround. 4. Schedule customer update call. 5. Monitor issue until resolution. 6. Share RCA after resolution.

snippets.heading: WHEN TO USE
snippets.text: - Multiple unresolved tickets. - SLA violations. - Customer dissatisfaction. - Critical production issue.

snippets.heading: INDICATORS
snippets.text: - Login frequency decreased. - Less than 50% feature adoption. - New users not onboarded. - Support tickets related to onboarding.

snippets.heading: RECOMMENDED ACTIONS
snippets.text: 1. Conduct onboarding session. 2. Schedule product walkthrough. 3. Share product documentation. 4. Assign Customer Success Manager. 5. Track adoption every week. 6. Review product analytics. 7. Schedule follow-up after 14 days.

snippets.heading: ENTERPRISE PLAN
snippets.text: Dedicated Success Manager. Quarterly Executive Reviews. Premium Support. Custom Integrations.

snippets.heading: DISCOUNT POLICY
snippets.text: More than 500 licenses Eligible for enterprise discount. Renewals may receive negotiated pricing.
